zh.lifeSummary: 當William Forman於大約1511年出生在英國肯特時，他的父親Stephen Foreman23歲，母親Alice Anderson32歲。他於1531年與Agnes Tilley Bowen在英國英格蘭肯特布藍利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1556年12月18日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國肯特布藍利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Forman于大约1511年出生在英国肯特时，他的父亲Stephen Foreman23岁，母亲Alice Anderson32岁。他于1531年与Agnes Tilley Bowen在英国英格兰肯特布藍利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1556年12月18日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国肯特布藍利。

nameMeanings.name: Forman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status name for a leader or spokesman for a group, from Middle English fore-man ‘foreman, reeve’ (from the Old English prefix fore- ‘foremost’ + mann ‘man’). The word is attested in this sense from the 15th century, but is not used specifically for the leader of a gang of workers before the late 16th century.
English: variant of Fordman with loss of -d-, from Middle English ford ‘ford’ (Old English ford) + man, denoting either a dweller by or a keeper of a ford. Compare Forder .

variants.name: Foreman
meanings: Altered form of North German Formann, a variant of Fuhrmann or Fohrman .

variants.name: Formanek
meanings: Czech (Formánek): from a diminutive of Forman .

variants.name: Forder
meanings: English: from an agent derivative of Middle English ford ‘ford’ (Old English ford), denoting either someone who lived near a ford or the keeper of a ford.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When William Forman was born about 1511, in Kent, England, his father, Stephen Foreman, was 23 and his mother, Alice Anderson, was 32. He married Agnes Tilley Bowen in 1531, in Brenchley, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died before 18 December 1556, in his hometown, and was buried in Brenchley, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Forman est né environ 1511, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, Stephen Foreman, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Alice Anderson, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Tilley Bowen en 1531, à Brenchley, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé avant 18 décembre 1556, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Brenchley, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Forman um 1511 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Stephen Foreman 23 und seine Mutter Alice Anderson 32. Er hat 1531 in Brenchley, Kent, England, United Kingdom Agnes Tilley Bowen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb vor 18. Dezember 1556 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Brenchley, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Forman è nato il circa 1511 nel Kent, England, il suo padre, Stephen Foreman, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Alice Anderson, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Tilley Bowen nel 1531, nel Brenchley, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì prima del 18 dicembre 1556, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Brenchley, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Formanが約1511年にイギリスケントで生まれた時，父Stephen Foremanは23歳，母Alice Andersonは32歳であった。1531年にイギリスイギリスケントブレンチリーでAgnes Tilley Bowenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1556年12月18日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスケントブレンチリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Forman(이)가 대략 1511년 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Stephen Foreman(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Anderson(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1531년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 브렌클리에서 Agnes Tilley Bowen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1556년 12월 18일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 켄트 브렌클리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Forman nasceu aproximadamente 1511, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Stephen Foreman, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Alice Anderson, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Tilley Bowen em 1531, em Brenchley, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 18 de dezembro de 1556, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Brenchley, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Forman родился около 1511 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Stephen Foreman было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Anderson, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Tilley Bowen в 1531 г. в местности бренчли, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер перед 18 декабрь 1556 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности бренчли, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Forman nació aproximadamente 1511, en Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Stephen Foreman, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Alice Anderson, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Agnes Tilley Bowen en 1531, en Brenchley, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió antes de 18 de diciembre de 1556, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Brenchley, Kent, Inglaterra.
